name: phoenix-365
description: Microsoft 365 integration for Phoenix Electric AI — mail, calendar, SharePoint, OneDrive
author: Phoenix Echo / Shane Warehime

commands.description: Microsoft 365 hub — connection status and available sub-commands

commands.name: mail
commands.description: Email operations — list, read, send, search messages via Microsoft Graph

commands.name: sharepoint
commands.description: SharePoint operations — browse sites, read lists, manage items, upload files

commands.name: calendar
commands.description: Calendar operations — view today/week schedule, create events

skills.name: graph-operations
skills.description: Triggers when user asks about M365 data — email, calendar, files, SharePoint

skills.name: sharepoint-data
skills.description: Triggers when user asks to look up, check, or update SharePoint data

skills.name: email-composer
skills.description: Triggers when user wants to send, draft, or reply to an email

agents.name: m365-operations
agents.description: Autonomous agent for chaining multiple M365 operations together

agents.name: sharepoint-analyst
agents.description: Specialized agent for SharePoint data retrieval, analysis, and cross-referencing

hooks.name: session-start
hooks.description: Checks M365 connection status on session start
